narrative:
Scioto Twp township has 1,142 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
